source_name: Code4rena Ethena Labs Findings and Analysis Report (2024-11) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: Non-blacklisted addresses can’t burn UStb tokens in a FULLY_ENABLED transfer state if address(0) is blaklisted
why_it_looked_bad: - Only non-blacklisted addresses can send/receive/burn UStb tokens in a FULLY_ENABLED transfer state.
why_not_valid: address(0) blacklist interaction is a configuration edge case that blocks burns rather than enabling unauthorized asset extraction
downgrade_reason: address(0) blacklist interaction is a configuration edge case that blocks burns rather than enabling unauthorized asset extraction
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if combined with permissionless access or large-value state transitions
if the affected path becomes critical to mint/redeem/withdrawal solvency or availability
